title: askporter World Cup Sweepstake
html:
🏆 askporter Sweepstake Command Center 🏆

Full 11-Player Tournament Roster · Updated 30 June 2026

📋 Sweepstake Guide

How the askporter sweepstake works
  • Each person was randomly drawn 4 national teams at the start of the World Cup.
  • You win if one of your teams wins the final on 19 July — last team standing takes the prize.
  • Once a team loses a knockout match, they're OUT and no longer in the running for you.
  • We're now in the Round of 32 (last 32 teams) — every match is win-or-go-home. Draws go to extra time, then penalties.
  • You don't need to understand football — just cheer for the flag next to your name when their match is on!

Round of 32 — Every Match & Who It Affects

When (UK)Matchaskporter stakesPlain-English previewStar to watch
Sun 28 Jun, 20:00🇿🇦 South Africa 0–1 🇨🇦 CanadaChris ✅ Canada Russ ❌ SACanada (hosts) edged through — Chris still alive.Alphonso Davies (Canada)
Mon 29 Jun, 21:30🇩🇪 Germany 1–1 🇵🇾 Paraguay (pens)Tony ✅ Paraguay Tony ❌ GermanyHuge upset on penalties — Tony keeps Paraguay but loses Germany.Miguel Almirón (Paraguay)
Tue 30 Jun, 02:00🇳🇱 Netherlands 1–1 🇲🇦 Morocco (pens)Fraiser ✅ Morocco Stephen ❌ NetherlandsMorocco won the shootout — Fraiser stays in, Stephen loses the Dutch.Achraf Hakimi (Morocco)
Mon 29 Jun, 18:00🇧🇷 Brazil 2–1 🇯🇵 JapanHarry ✅ Brazil Harry ❌ JapanBrazil's experience told — Harry still has the favourites.Vinícius Júnior (Brazil)
Tue 30 Jun, 22:00🇫🇷 France vs 🇸🇪 SwedenChloe — FranceFrance heavy favouritesKylian Mbappé (France)
Tue 30 Jun, 18:00🇨🇮 Côte d'Ivoire vs 🇳🇴 NorwayLouise — both teams!Louise guaranteed one survivor — winner plays Brazil next.Erling Haaland (Norway)
Wed 1 Jul, 02:00🇲🇽 Mexico vs 🇪🇨 EcuadorLouise — Mexico Stephen — EcuadorMexico slight favourites at home (Azteca)Hirving Lozano (Mexico)
Wed 1 Jul, 17:00🏴 England vs 🇨🇩 Congo DRHarry — England Fraiser — Congo DREngland heavy favourites — office derby!Harry Kane (England) · Yoane Wissa (Congo DR)
Thu 2 Jul, 01:00🇺🇸 USA vs 🇧🇦 BosniaRuss — USA Till — BosniaUSA favoured as hosts — Russ and Till both need an upset.Christian Pulisic (USA) · Edin Džeko (Bosnia)
Wed 1 Jul, 21:00🇧🇪 Belgium vs 🇸🇳 SenegalJosh — Belgium Charlotte — SenegalVery even — someone in the office goes out.Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) · Sadio Mané (Senegal)
Thu 3 Jul, 00:00🇵🇹 Portugal vs 🇭🇷 CroatiaTill — Portugal Louise — CroatiaPortugal slight favourites — another office derby.Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) · Luka Modrić (Croatia)
Thu 2 Jul, 20:00🇪🇸 Spain vs 🇦🇹 AustriaChris — Spain Fraiser — AustriaSpain heavy favourites — office derby.Lamine Yamal (Spain)
Thu 3 Jul, 04:00🇨🇭 Switzerland vs 🇩🇿 AlgeriaJosh — Switzerland Tony — AlgeriaOffice derby — one of Josh or Tony goes out.Granit Xhaka (Switzerland)
Fri 3 Jul, 23:00🇦🇷 Argentina vs 🇨🇻 Cape VerdeTill — Argentina Charlotte — Cape VerdeArgentina heavy favourites — defending champs.Lionel Messi (Argentina)
Sat 4 Jul, 02:30🇨🇴 Colombia vs 🇬🇭 GhanaCharlotte — ColombiaColombia slight favourites.Luis Díaz (Colombia)
Fri 3 Jul, 19:00🇦🇺 Australia vs 🇪🇬 EgyptStephen — Australia Charlotte — EgyptAustralia slight favourites — office derby.Mathew Ryan (Australia)

Who's Still in With a Shot — Quick Reference

PersonTeams still aliveNext match to watchWhy they might win it all
Chris🇪🇸 Spain · 🇨🇦 CanadaSpain vs Austria (Thu 20:00) · R16 vs Morocco (Sat 4 Jul)Canada already through — faces Fraiser's Morocco in the Round of 16.
Josh🇧🇪 Belgium · 🇨🇭 SwitzerlandBelgium vs Senegal (Wed 21:00) · Switzerland vs Algeria (Thu 04:00)Two strong European sides — faces Charlotte and Tony in the next two days.
Fraiser🇲🇦 Morocco · 🇨🇩 Congo DR · 🇦🇹 AustriaEngland vs Congo DR (Wed 17:00) · Spain vs Austria (Thu 20:00) · R16 vs Canada (Sat 4 Jul)Morocco already through — office clash with Chris in the Round of 16.
Tony🇵🇾 Paraguay · 🇩🇿 AlgeriaAlgeria vs Switzerland (Thu 04:00) · R16 (Sat 4 Jul)Paraguay knocked out Germany on penalties — giant-killers.
Louise🇲🇽 Mexico · 🇳🇴 Norway · 🇭🇷 Croatia · 🇨🇮 Côte d'IvoireNorway vs Côte d'Ivoire (Tue 18:00 — guaranteed one through) · Mexico vs Ecuador (Wed 02:00) · Portugal vs Croatia (Thu 00:00)Best hand tonight — owns both teams in the Ivory Coast vs Norway match.
Chloe🇫🇷 FranceFrance vs Sweden (Tue 22:00 — tonight!)France topped their group and have Mbappé — outright favourites to go deep.
Till🇦🇷 Argentina · 🇧🇦 Bosnia · 🇵🇹 PortugalPortugal vs Croatia (Thu 00:00) · USA vs Bosnia (Thu 01:00) · Argentina vs Cape Verde (Fri 23:00)Three teams still in — Argentina are defending champions.
Harry🏴 England · 🇧🇷 BrazilEngland vs Congo DR (Wed 17:00) · R16 (Sat 4 Jul)Brazil beat Japan and await the Norway/Ivory Coast winner.
Charlotte🇨🇻 Cape Verde · 🇸🇳 Senegal · 🇪🇬 Egypt · 🇨🇴 ColombiaSenegal vs Belgium (Wed 21:00) · Australia vs Egypt (Fri 19:00) · Argentina vs Cape Verde (Fri 23:00) · Colombia vs Ghana (Sat 02:30)Four teams still alive — busy week ahead.
Stephen🇦🇺 Australia · 🇪🇨 EcuadorEcuador vs Mexico (Wed 02:00) · Australia vs Egypt (Fri 19:00)Lost the Netherlands but Ecuador still alive — faces Louise's Mexico on Wednesday.
Russ🇺🇸 USAUSA vs Bosnia (Thu 01:00)One team left — USA are Russ’s last chance to stay alive.

Tournament Roadmap — What Happens Next

Round of 32
28 Jun – 3 Jul 2026
32 teams → 16. We're here now. Lose once and you're out.
Round of 16
4 – 7 Jul 2026
16 teams → 8. Matches across USA, Mexico & Canada.
Quarter-finals
9 – 11 Jul 2026
8 teams → 4. The serious business starts.
Semi-finals
14 – 15 Jul 2026
4 teams → 2. Lose and you play for 3rd place.
Third-place play-off
18 Jul 2026 · Miami
Doesn't affect the sweepstake — only the final winner counts.
🏆 Final
19 Jul 2026 · New York
Winner takes the World Cup — and the askporter sweepstake prize!

Times shown in UK (BST). Knockout draws go to extra time, then penalties if still level. Broadcast on BBC & ITV in the UK.
